description_long: This armchair features a sturdy wooden frame with a natural finish, showcasing vertical slats on the back and gently curved armrests. The seat and backrest are both fitted with thick, removable cushions upholstered in a red and white patterned fabric, providing a comfortable and inviting appearance. The armrests are smooth, slightly arched, and seamlessly integrated into the frame, enhancing both support and style. The legs are straight and robust, made from the same wood as the frame, ensuring stability. The upholstery pattern is visually dynamic, with a woven texture that adds depth and character. This armchair would be well-suited for urban parks, public seating areas, or residential porches.
description: A wooden-framed armchair with curved armrests and thick, red patterned cushions on the seat and back. The design combines comfort with a visually striking woven upholstery.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the vertical wooden slats and the back cushion's full coverage.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the armrest's gentle curve and the thickness of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the broad seat, patterned cushions, and open armrests.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the cushion depth and wooden frame details.
attribute_backrest_style: medium-height, straight, with vertical wooden slats and a full cushion
attribute_leg_type: straight wooden legs integrated with the frame
attribute_upholstery_pattern: red and white woven fabric with a mottled pattern
